result.stdout:
dbup-cli 1.8.1
Copyright (c) 2023 Sergey Tregub

  init                Create a new config file

  upgrade             Upgrade database

  mark-as-executed    Mark all scripts as executed

  drop                Drop database if exists

  status              Show upgrade status

  help                Display more information on a specific command.

  version             Display version information.

dbup-cli 1.8.1
Copyright (c) 2023 Sergey Tregub

  init                Create a new config file

  upgrade             Upgrade database

  mark-as-executed    Mark all scripts as executed

  drop                Drop database if exists

  status              Show upgrade status

  help                Display more information on a specific command.

  version             Display version information.

result.stdout:
dbup-cli 1.8.1
Copyright (c) 2023 Sergey Tregub

  -e, --env          Path to an environment file. Can be more than one file
                     specified. The path can be absolute or relative against a
                     current directory

  -v, --verbosity    (Default: Normal) Verbosity level. Can be one of: detail,
                     normal or min

  --help             Display this help screen.

  --version          Display version information.

  value pos. 0       (Default: dbup.yml) Path to a configuration file. The path
                     can be absolute or relative against a current directory

result.stdout:
dbup-cli 1.8.1
Copyright (c) 2023 Sergey Tregub

  -x, --show-executed        (Default: false) Print names of executed scripts

  -n, --show-not-executed    (Default: false) Print names of scripts to be
                             execute

  -e, --env                  Path to an environment file. Can be more than one
                             file specified. The path can be absolute or
                             relative against a current directory

  --help                     Display this help screen.

  --version                  Display version information.

  value pos. 0               (Default: dbup.yml) Path to a configuration file.
                             The path can be absolute or relative against a
                             current directory
